summary: This 1949 secret memo from Headquarters, Detachment D, 1100th USAF Special Reporting Group at Camp Campbell, Kentucky, is a follow-up security inspection report addressing gate locks, alert plans, radio communications, and erosion control measures; it does not describe any aerial observation. A separate cover sheet from Sandia Base's classified documents library lists the file subject as unidentified flying objects for 1949, but no incident details are given.
